summary: Serializes a structured token descriptor into a normalized semicolon-delimited string after validating the primary token.
signature_intent: Accepts an object-like descriptor with a required token and optional attributes, returning a normalized string representation.
behavior: Rejects a missing, non-string, or syntactically invalid primary token with a TypeError.
Lowercases the primary token in the returned value.
When optional attributes are present as an object, serializes them after the primary token.
Orders serialized attributes alphabetically by attribute key.
Formats each attribute as a key-value pair separated by an equals sign.
Uses quoted string formatting for normal attributes.
Uses unquoted string formatting for attributes whose key ends with an asterisk.
edge_cases: Attribute ordering is deterministic regardless of input order.
Invalid primary tokens fail before any attribute serialization occurs.
forbidden_details: Internal helper names beyond their observable formatting role.
Incidental implementation details not needed to describe behavior.
